series_metadata.series_description: File contains results of welder/brazer test for qualifying to previously qualified welding brazing procedures as required by 4101:8-15 OAC filed under company name. Welder/brazer requalifications necessary each five year period from test date.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: master microfilm in appropriate storage facility records are no longer created by this agency. diazo copy in operating area ; Paper: Microfilm existing records; new records be kept on hard copy and microfilmed annually. microfilm has been checked quality and completeness
